ham.subject: Transaction Alert – $123.45 Purchase on 15 Aug 2024
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

A recent transaction of $123.45 was made to XYZ Store on 15 Aug 2024 at 02:34 PM from the account ending in 7890.

If you did not authorize this transaction or have any questions, please contact our support center immediately at 1-800-555-0199.

Thank you,
Bank of Example
Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice #123456 – Payment Required
spam.body:
Dear QuickBooks User,

Your QuickBooks subscription invoice (#123456) for the amount of $89.99 is now due. Please complete payment within the next 48 hours to avoid interruption of your services.

Click here to pay: <URL>

If you have already paid, please disregard this message.

Thank you,
QuickBooks Billing Department
